properties.name: Former PFAFF Industrial Site
properties.description: Former industrial area of the PFAFF sewing machine company in western Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: One of the most important industrial heritage locations in Kaiserslautern and a key site for understanding the city's manufacturing history.

properties.name: Pfaff-Quartier
properties.description: New urban redevelopment area on the former PFAFF factory site.
properties.historical_relevance: Shows the transformation of former industrial land into a mixed urban quarter.

properties.name: Karl-Pfaff-Siedlung
properties.description: Former workers' settlement connected to the PFAFF sewing machine company.
properties.historical_relevance: Represents the social and housing history of industrial workers in Kaiserslautern.

properties.name: Kammgarn Cultural Center
properties.description: Cultural venue located in a former spinning factory.
properties.historical_relevance: A clear example of industrial reuse, where a former production site became a cultural space.
properties.historical_period: Industrial period to present cultural reuse

properties.name: Fruchthalle
properties.description: Important 19th-century landmark and cultural building in central Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Represents civic architecture, public life, and cultural history in the city centre.

properties.name: Theodor-Zink-Museum
properties.description: City museum presenting the history of Kaiserslautern and the surrounding region.
properties.historical_relevance: Useful as an interpretation point for the historical development of the city.
properties.historical_period: City history from early settlement to present

properties.name: Pfalztheater
properties.description: Major theatre and cultural institution in the centre of Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Represents the city's modern cultural infrastructure and public cultural life.

properties.name: Kaiserpfalz and Casimir Castle Area
properties.description: Historic palace and castle area connected to the medieval and early modern history of Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Important historical anchor for the older urban development of Kaiserslautern.

properties.name: Stiftskirche and Old Town Area
properties.description: Historic church and surrounding old town area in central Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Useful for showing the older religious and urban core of the city.

properties.name: Kaiserslautern Hauptbahnhof
properties.historical_relevance: Important for understanding transport, mobility, and the industrial-era growth of the city.

properties.name: Stadtpark
properties.description: Public park near the station and the city centre.
properties.historical_relevance: Represents public green space and urban life in Kaiserslautern.

properties.name: Japanese Garden
properties.description: Designed garden and public cultural landscape in Kaiserslautern.
properties.historical_relevance: Adds a contemporary public-space layer to the map and balances the industrial and historical sites.
